title: Record a media readiness contract
prompt: Create reports/media-readiness-contract.md with sections for Provider keys, /status Media gate, GenerateImage path, and GenerateVideo path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Media Readiness Contract

## Provider keys
OPENAI_API_KEY or GOOGLE_API_KEY/GEMINI_API_KEY

## /status Media gate
show ready/key/missing without MCP

## GenerateImage path
.superliora/generated/images/<timestamp>.png

## GenerateVideo path
.superliora/generated/videos/<timestamp>.mp4
